title: NET_LINK_UNKNOWN may cause issues with IPv6 stack features
description: Location: lichen_l2.c:444-445. net_if_set_link_addr uses NET_LINK_UNKNOWN. Zephyrs IPv6 stack may use link type for NDP, SLAAC, or packet framing decisions. Should verify whether NET_LINK_IEEE802154 or a custom type is more appropriate for EUI-64 addressing, or document that NET_LINK_UNKNOWN is intentional and tested.
close_reason: Changed NET_LINK_UNKNOWN to NET_LINK_IEEE802154 with comment explaining it's the closest match for 8-byte EUI-64 addresses
